channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Durban City goalkeeper Darren Keet retires after Nedbank Cup triumph
item.description: Durban City’s veteran goalkeeper Darren Keet has announced he will retire at the end of the current season, choosing to bow out on a high note after helping his team secure the Nedbank Cup title again...

item.title: Kano APC Leaders Endorse Jibrin, Doguwa for 2027 Senate and House of Reps Elections
item.description: For Kano, the APC stakeholders dem don officially endorse the Deputy Senate President, Barau Jibrin, for reelection come 2027. The committee wey represent all 13 local government areas for Kano North ...

item.title: Researchers Investigate Natural Sugar 2dDR for Potential Hair Regrowth
item.description: Male pattern baldness affects roughly half of all men, yet only two FDA-approved treatments currently exist. Recent research from the University of Sheffield and COMSATS University Pakistan suggests t...

item.title: Assembly election results from five states indicate national political trends
item.description: The assembly elections in five Indian states—West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Assam, Kerala, and Puducherry—are expected to offer insights into the national political climate. In West Bengal, BJP is attemptin...

item.title: An Oakland Party Experiments with Equalizing Guests’ Heights Using Custom Platform Shoes
item.description: In Oakland, artist Lucian Novosel hosted a unique social experiment known as a 'same-height party,' inspired by German artist Hans Hemmert's 1997 installation 'Level.' The event aimed to equalize all ...

item.title: LTO Issues Show Cause Order Against Van Driver in Traffic Enforcer Hit-and-Run
item.description: The Land Transportation Office (LTO) has formally summoned the driver of a black van involved in a hit-and-run incident with a traffic enforcer, following a viral video shared on Facebook showing the ...

item.title: Joel Embiid and Tyrese Maxey lead 76ers past Celtics in NBA playoff series
item.description: In an intense NBA playoff showdown, the Philadelphia 76ers secured a crucial victory over the Boston Celtics, advancing further in the postseason. The game highlighted exceptional performances from Jo...

item.title: Tondo Church to be Declared Minor Basilica on May 11
item.description: The Archdiocesan Shrine and Parish of Santo Niño de Tondo in Manila will be declared a minor basilica on May 11, 2026. The event will be led by Apostolic Nuncio Charles John Brown, with Manila Archbis...

item.title: Vosloorus spaza shop owner Mazwi Kubheka returns after month-long disappearance
item.description: Mazwi Kubheka, a spaza shop owner from Vosloorus, went missing on 2 April while allegedly on his way to deposit money at a bank. A month later, on 2 May, Kubheka walked into the Vosloorus police stati...

item.title: Investigation Finds FDA Raised Concerns About COVID Vaccine Side Effects That Were Not Fully Addressed
item.description: A recent report by Senator Ron Johnson suggests that the Biden administration may have neglected potential COVID-19 vaccine side effects during the early rollout of the vaccines. The investigation foc...

item.title: APC names Jamilu Gwamna as governorship candidate for Gombe 2027
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) in Gombe State has officially selected candidates for all positions to be contested in the upcoming 2027 General Election. Jamilu Gwamna, a former managing director...

item.title: ECI Ensures Transparency and Security in Vote Counting Across Five States
item.description: The Election Commission of India (ECI) has made arrangements for the smooth and transparent counting of votes for the Assembly elections in Assam, Kerala, Tamil Nadu, West Bengal, Puducherry, and bye-...

item.title: GalaxEye launches Drishti, the world’s first OptoSAR satellite, boosting India’s Earth observation capacity
item.description: Bengaluru-based space startup GalaxEye has launched its first commercial satellite, Drishti, aboard SpaceX’s Falcon-9 rocket, marking a major milestone for India’s private space sector. The satellite ...

item.title: Three People Injured After Detour Bridge Collapse in Ilocos Sur
item.description: Three individuals were injured when a detour bridge in Ilocos Sur collapsed, an incident attributed to a 10-wheeler truck crossing the structure. The mishap occurred as local authorities continue repa...

item.title: ABS-CBN News Updates for Regional Viewers on May 3, 2026
item.description: On May 3, 2026, ABS-CBN continues its commitment to delivering quality regional news through its broadcast program, TV Patrol Regional. The report emphasizes ABS-CBN’s ongoing role as a leading media ...

item.title: Metrolinx issues updated notice on Barrie GO train service adjustments
item.description: Metrolinx is advising commuters in the Barrie corridor to prepare for additional changes to GO Transit service, as ongoing infrastructure work and service adjustments continue to affect schedules. The...

item.title: Trump announces US escort of foreign ships from Strait of Hormuz amid Iran conflict
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump has declared that the United States will begin escorting foreign vessels through the Strait of Hormuz as part of a humanitarian initiative, named 'Project Freedom'. Th...

item.title: Suspected Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship Results in Three Deaths and Multiple Illnesses
item.description: A suspected hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, a polar cruise ship operated by Dutch company Oceanwide Expeditions, has resulted in three fatalities and several other passengers falling ill. The W...

item.title: Alex Ferguson hospitalised for precautionary checks after feeling unwell at Old Trafford
item.description: Former Manchester United manager Sir Alex Ferguson was taken to hospital after reportedly feeling unwell at Old Trafford ahead of a high-profile Premier League clash between Manchester United and Live...

item.title: KZN Boxing Chair Seeks Government Support to Establish Community Boxing Facility
item.description: Sandile Vilakazi, chairperson of the KwaZulu-Natal Boxing Federation, has made a heartfelt appeal to Sports, Arts and Culture Minister Gayton McKenzie to assist in creating a major community boxing gy...
